patches.summary: Added agent-native BreezeDoc workflows for invoice lifecycle, client workspace snapshot, document follow-up, and signature packet prep.
patches.reason: The generated endpoint wrappers exposed the raw API, but agents needed compound workflows that coordinate related BreezeDoc operations with structured output and dry-run/send safety.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; full live dogfood passed 86/86 counted tests with mutating workflow paths exercised under --dry-run.

patches.summary: Normalized BreezeDoc base URL/base path handling so saved configs do not double-prefix /api.
patches.reason: The printed CLI could persist base_url=https://breezedoc.com/api with base_path=/api, which caused live requests to hit /api/api/*.
patches.validated_outcome: doctor --json reported credentials valid and live client-workspace-snapshot returned account counts from https://breezedoc.com/api/*.

patches.summary: Hardened response cache permissions and made auth set-token persist to the BreezeDoc API token field.
patches.reason: Cached API responses can contain sensitive document, invoice, and recipient data; saved tokens should also land in the same api_token config field advertised by the auth setup flow.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; go build ./... passed; auth set-token wrote api_token without persisting alternate bearer env vars; public-library package, skill, supply-chain, and govulncheck verifiers passed.
